title: Keywords Studios lead says just 1% of AI tools tested have proved useful for game development | ScreenHub: Film, TV, Streaming and Games
text:

Keywords Studios lead says just 1% of AI tools tested have proved useful for game development
Keywords Studios' Head of Transformation has claimed many AI tools tested for development simply don't solve problems.
13 Apr 2026 11:42
Leah J. Williams
Games
Image: Farzad / Unsplash.
Keywords Studios’ Head of Transformation Jon Gibson has claimed that while many game studios are rapidly adopting new AI-powered tools for game development, just a handful are actually useful and provide solutions to real problems.
Speaking to
The Game Business
, Gibson revealed that Keywords Studios has tested around 500 AI game development tools to help speed up its workflow. The studio typically works in a support capacity, and has provided additional development for major games like
Batman: Arkham Shadow, Still Wakes the Deep
and
Goat Simulator 3
.
